title: Manufacturing Engineer - Maruti Suzuki India Capital India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Maruti Suzuki India Capital India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Maruti Suzuki India Capital India! We are hiring a Manufacturing Engineer for our Ahmedabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Maruti Suzuki India Capital India:
Maruti Suzuki India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India Capital India!
